task_completion.description: Navigate to the OpenCAD login page
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD login screen is visible in the web browser.
The email 'admin@opencad.local' is typed into the username/email field on the login form.

task_completion.description: Successfully log in to the OpenCAD system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenCAD main dashboard or logged-in interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Data Manager or Citation Types management page
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page displaying a list of citation types or the Data Manager interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Initiate the deletion of the 'Unsecured Excavation' citation type
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking a delete button, trash icon, or confirming a deletion prompt specifically associated with the 'Unsecured Excavation' entry.

task_completion.description: Verify the citation type has been deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the citation type was deleted is shown, OR the citation types list is visible and 'Unsecured Excavation' is no longer present in the list.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the system
integrity.visual_evidence: The actions take place within a web browser window (e.g., Chromium/Firefox) rather than using terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenCAD application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the genuine OpenCAD web interface, not a text editor modifying source code or a mock HTML file.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application UI to modify the database directly
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no terminal window showing direct SQL queries (e.g., using the 'mysql' command line tool) to delete the citation type.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target citation type to delete: 'Unsecured Excavation'. Administrator credentials: 'admin@opencad.local' / 'Admin123!'.
